llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Reported highest-ever consolidated net profit at ₹1,044 crore in Q4FY26 (against ₹363 crore in Q4FY25); EBITDA jumped 78.5% Y-o-Y; revenue grew 35% Y-o-Y. Stock surged 6% in intraday trade and 21% in three days.

Reported 153% Y-o-Y jump in consolidated net profit at ₹103.7 crore in Q4FY26; revenue rose 58% Y-o-Y; EBITDA margin expanded. Achieved highest-ever annual revenue and profitability in FY26. Contract period for SEAMEC II extended by ONGC.
Outperformed the market by zooming over 50% in calendar year 2026, alongside other shipping companies reporting strong earnings.

PL Capital maintained 'Buy' rating despite target price cut, citing healthy Q4 volume growth (24.2% in plastic pipe segment) and expectations of rising PVC resin prices, volume uptick, and margin improvement post new CPVC resin plant commissioning. Estimates sales/Ebitda/PAT CAGR of 16.6%/20.2%/31.3% over FY26-28E.
Scheduled to announce Q4FY26 earnings today, May 19.
Scheduled to announce Q4FY26 earnings today, May 19.

Scheduled to announce Q4FY26 earnings today, May 19.

Goldman Sachs reiterated 'Buy' rating due to accelerating growth across payments, lending, and financial services. Company expects revenue growth to accelerate in FY27, with improved operating leverage and path to 15-20% EBITDA margins. Merchant lending business expected to grow 35-40% in next few years. No meaningful impact from recent regulatory changes.
